---
title: "Homework"
---

## Homework 1: Markov model

Build a cohort Markov model and report total costs, total QALYs, and the ICER.

## Homework 2: Microsimulation

Extend the patient-level simulation to include patient heterogeneity.

## Homework 3: Sensitivity analysis

Run deterministic and probabilistic sensitivity analysis on your model.
